title: Portfolio Town
description: Interactive 2D pixel-art portfolio built with Phaser 3 where visitors can explore projects, skills, achievements, education, and more through immersive gameplay.

title: FPGA Smart Irrigation Control System
description: Developed an FPGA-based Smart Irrigation System using Verilog HDL to automatically control irrigation based on soil moisture and humidity.

title: Digital IC Tester
description: Arduino-based Digital IC Tester capable of verifying the functionality of basic logic ICs including AND, OR, NOT, NAND, and NOR gates.

title: Digital Dice
description: Digital Dice using NE555 Timer with pseudo-random number generation and real-time seven-segment display output.

title: Smart Hand Gesture Control System
description: Arduino-powered hand gesture control system using ultrasonic sensors to perform touchless computer interactions.

title: Audio Amplifier with Stage
description: Designed and implemented a multi-stage audio amplifier to achieve stable signal amplification with improved audio quality.

title: Audio Noise Cancellation using Wiener Filter
description: Designed a MATLAB-based audio noise cancellation system using the Wiener Filter to improve speech quality through optimal signal processing techniques.

title: PSD Verification using MATLAB
description: Verified the non-negativity and even symmetry properties of the Power Spectral Density (PSD) of WSS random processes through analytical derivation and MATLAB simulation.

title: Coming Soon
description: A new and exciting project is currently under development. Stay tuned for future updates!

title: Coming Soon
description: Another innovative project will be added here soon. More exciting work is on the way!
